description: Recto: Fragments of two lines of a state document in a chancery hand. Mentions the phrase "yataḍamman mablagh" and possibly "the village known as Ṭur Sīnā." Verso: The page is filled with mirror-image Arabic script. It seems to be the imprint of a deed of sale. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
